source.span_hint: it has net tangible assets of at least

text: it has net tangible assets of at least three crore rupees, calculated on a restated and consolidated basis, in each of the preceding three full years (of twelve months each), of which not more than fifty per cent. are held in monetary assets.
title: Net tangible assets ≥ ₹3 cr, not > 50% monetary assets
notes: Net tangible assets requirement; not more than 50% can be monetary assets.

source.span_hint: it has an average operating profit of at least

text: it has an average operating profit of at least fifteen crore rupees, calculated on a restated and consolidated basis, during the preceding three years (of twelve months each), with operating profit in each of these preceding three years.
title: Operating profit ≥ ₹15 cr in each of last 3 years
notes: Three-year operating profit requirement; computed on restated and consolidated basis.

source.span_hint: it has a net worth of at least

text: it has a net worth of at least one crore rupees in each of the preceding three full years (of twelve months each), calculated on a restated and consolidated basis:
title: Net worth ≥ ₹1 cr in each of last 3 years
notes: Three-year net worth requirement; computed on restated and consolidated basis.

source.span_hint: it has made an application to one or more

text: it has made an application to exactly one stock exchange to seek in-principle approval for listing of its specified securities on such stock exchange,
title: Application for in-principle approval (atomic)
notes: Application for in-principle approval from exactly one stock exchange. | QUARANTINED: NOT_ATOMIC,LOSES_THRESHOLD,HALLUCINATION,MISSING_QUALIFIER,MAPS_TO_BAD_FIELD,MAPS_TO_BAD_TYPE,BAD_SPAN_HINT

source.span_hint: it has entered into an agreement with a depository

text: it has entered into an agreement with a depository for dematerialisation of the specified securities already issued and proposed to be issued;
title: Agreement with depository for dematerialisation
notes: Agreement with depository for dematerialisation of specified securities.

source.span_hint: all its specified securities held by the promoters are in dematerialised form

text: all its specified securities held by the promoters are in dematerialised form prior to filing of the offer document;
title: Promoter's specified securities in dematerialised form
notes: Specified securities held by promoters must be in dematerialised form before offer document filing.

source.span_hint: all its existing partly paid-up equity shares have either been fully paid-up

text: all its existing partly paid-up equity shares have either been fully paid-up or have been forfeited;
title: Fully paid-up equity shares or forfeited
notes: Existing partly paid-up equity shares must be fully paid-up or forfeited.

source.span_hint: The amount for general corporate purposes

text: The amount for general corporate purposes shall not exceed twenty five per cent. of the amount being raised by the issuer.
title: Amount for general corporate purposes limit
notes: Limit for general corporate purposes; 25% of total funds raised.

source.span_hint: shall not exceed twenty five per cent.

text: shall not exceed twenty five per cent. of the amount being raised by the issuer: Provided that the amount raised for such objects where the issuer company has not identified acquisition or investment target, as mentioned in objects of the issue in the draft offer document and the offer document, shall not apply.
title: Amount for other unidentified objects limit (without exceeding 25%)
notes: Limit for other unidentified objects; 25% of total funds raised, unless no acquisition or investment target.

maps_to.constraints_text: ≤25% of amount raised; None if acquisition or investment target identified

source.span_hint: Only such fully paid-up equity shares may be offered

text: Only such fully paid-up equity shares may be offered for sale to the public, which have been held by the sellers for a period of at least one year prior to the filing of the draft offer document.
title: Maximum holding period for equity shares offered for sale
notes: One-year holding period requirement for equity shares offered for sale.

source.span_hint: Provided that in case of the equity shares received

text: Provided that in case of the equity shares received on conversion or exchange of fully paid-up compulsorily convertible securities including depository receipts are being offered for sale, the holding period of such convertible securities, including depository receipts, as well as that of resultant equity shares together shall be considered for the purpose of calculation of one year period referred in this sub-regulation.
title: Exceptions to the holding period for equity shares offered for sale
notes:
Exceptions to the one-year holding period requirement when equity shares arise from conversion or exchange of compulsorily convertible securities.
[QUARANTINED] hard=['span_hint_not_in_chunk'] soft=[]

source.span_hint: Provided further that such holding period

text: Provided further that such holding period of one year shall be required to be complied with at the time of filing of the draft offer document.
title: Additional conditions for the holding period of equity shares offered for sale
notes:
Additional condition for the one-year holding period requirement: compliance at the time of filing the draft offer document.
[QUARANTINED] hard=['bad_rule_id_format'] soft=[]

source.span_hint: it has obtained credit rating from at least one credit rating agency

text: In addition to other requirements laid down in these regulations, an issuer making an initial public offer of convertible debt instruments shall also comply with the following conditions: (a) it has obtained credit rating from at least one credit rating agency.
title: Credit rating required for CDI issuance
notes:
Credit rating requirement for CDI issuance.
[QUARANTINED] hard=['bad_rule_id_format'] soft=[]

source.span_hint: An issuer shall be eligible to make an initial public offer

text: An issuer shall be eligible to make an initial public offer of convertible debt instruments even without making a prior public issue of its equity shares and listing thereof. Provided that it is not in default of payment of interest or repayment of principal amount in respect of debt instruments issued by it to the public, if any, for a period of more than six months.
title: Issuer may issue convertible debt instruments without prior equity IPO
notes: Eligibility for issuing convertible debt instruments without prior equity IPO.

source.span_hint: it has appointed at least one debenture trustee

text: it has appointed at least one debenture trustee in accordance with the provisions of the Companies Act, 2013 and the Securities and Exchange Board of India (Debenture Trustees) Regulations, 1993;
title: Debenture trustee requirement for convertible debt instruments
notes:
Debenture trustee requirement for issuer of convertible debt instruments.
[QUARANTINED] hard=['bad_rule_id_format'] soft=[]

source.span_hint: Provided that it is not in default

text: Provided that it is not in default of payment of interest or repayment of principal amount in respect of debt instruments issued by it to the public, if any, for a period of more than six months.
title: Default payment or repayment period
notes: Default payment or repayment period for issuer of debt instruments.

source.span_hint: Where the value of the convertible portion of any listed convertible debt instruments issued by an issuer exceeds ten cr

text: If the value of the convertible portion of any listed convertible debt instruments issued by an issuer exceeds ten crore rupees and the issuer has not determined the conversion price, the holders shall be given the option to not convert the convertible portion into equity shares.
title: Option to not convert if conversion price is not determined

source.span_hint: the tenure of such warrants shall not exceed

text: the tenure of such warrants shall not exceed eighteen months from the date of their allotment in the initial public offer;
title: Warrant tenure ≤ 18 months
notes: Warrant tenure limit; computed from allotment date.

source.span_hint: the price or formula for determination of exercise

text: the price or formula for determination of exercise price of the warrants shall be determined upfront and at least twenty-five per cent. of the consideration amount based on the exercise price shall also be received upfront;
title: Warrant exercise price formula and upfront payment
notes: Warrant exercise price and upfront payment requirements.

source.span_hint: in case the warrant holder does not exercise

text: in case the warrant holder does not exercise the option to take equity shares against any of the warrants held by the warrant holder, within three months from the date of payment of consideration, such consideration made in respect of such warrants shall be forfeited by the issuer.
title: Warrant non-exercise forfeiture
notes: Forfeiture of consideration if warrant holder does not exercise option within 3 months.

source.span_hint: For the computation of minimum promoters’ contribution,

title: Securities ineligible for minimum promoters’ contribution

source.span_hint: For the computation of minimum promoters’

text: For the computation of minimum promoters’ contribution, the following specified securities shall not be eligible:
title: Specified securities ineligible for minimum promoters’ contribution (I)
notes: Specifies types of securities not eligible for minimum promoters' contribution.

source.span_hint: (i) acquired for consideration other than cash

text: (i) acquired for consideration other than cash and revaluation of assets or capitalisation of intangible assets is involved in such transaction;
title: Specified securities ineligible for minimum promoters’ contribution (I)(a)(i)
notes:
Condition for specified securities acquired for consideration other than cash.
[QUARANTINED] hard=['bad_rule_id_format'] soft=[]

source.span_hint: (ii) resulting from a bonus issue

text: (ii) resulting from a bonus issue by utilisation of revaluation reserves or unrealised profits of the issuer or from bonus issue against equity shares which are ineligible for minimum promoters’ contribution;
title: Specified securities ineligible for minimum promoters’ contribution (I)(a)(ii)
notes:
Condition for specified securities resulting from a bonus issue.
[QUARANTINED] hard=['bad_rule_id_format'] soft=[]

source.span_hint: The specified securities held by the promoters shall not be transferable

text: The specified securities held by the promoters shall not be transferable (hereinafter referred to as “lock-in”) for the periods as stipulated hereunder:
title: Lock-in of specified securities held by the promoters
notes: Lock-in periods for specified securities held by promoters.

source.span_hint: The specified securities held by the promoters shall not be transferable

text: The specified securities held by the promoters shall be locked-in for a period of eighteen months from the date of allotment in the initial public offer.
title: Lock-in period for promoter contribution
notes:
Lock-in period for promoter contribution; excluding excess holding.
[QUARANTINED] hard=['bad_rule_id_format'] soft=[]

source.span_hint: The specified securities held by the promoters shall not be transferable

text: The promoters’ holding in excess of minimum promoters’ contribution shall be locked-in for a period of six months from the date of allotment in the initial public offer.
title: Lock-in period for promoter excess holding
notes:
Lock-in period for promoter excess holding; excluding contribution.
[QUARANTINED] hard=['bad_rule_id_format'] soft=[]

source.span_hint: The entire pre-issue capital held by persons other than the promoters

text: The entire pre-issue capital held by persons other than the promoters shall be locked-in for a period of six months from the date of allotment in the initial public offer.
title: Lock-in of pre-issue capital held by non-promoters
notes: Lock-in period for pre-issue capital held by non-promoters.

source.span_hint: Provided that nothing contained in this regulation shall apply to:

text:
Provided that nothing contained in this regulation shall apply to: 
(a) equity shares allotted to employees, whether currently an employee or not, under an employee stock option or employee stock purchase scheme; (b) equity shares held by an employee stock option trust or transferred to the employees by an employee stock option trust pursuant to exercise of options by the employees, whether currently employees or not, in accordance with the employee stock option plan or employee stock purchase scheme;
title: Exceptions to lock-in for non-promoters
notes: Exceptions to lock-in for equity shares allotted to employees or held by employee stock option trusts.

source.span_hint: equity shares held by a venture capital fund or alternative investment fund of category I

text:
c) equity shares held by a venture capital fund or alternative investment fund of category I or Category II or a foreign venture capital investor: 
Provided that such equity shares shall be locked in for a period of at least six months from the date of purchase by the venture capital fund or alternative investment fund of Category I or Category II or foreign venture capital investor.
title: Lock-in for equity shares held by venture capital funds or alternative investment funds
notes: Lock-in period for equity shares held by venture capital funds or alternative investment funds.

source.span_hint: Specified securities held by the promoters and locked-in may be

text: If the specified securities which are subject to lock-in are locked-in in terms of clause (a) of regulation 16, the loan has been granted to the issuer company or its subsidiary(ies) for the purpose of financing one or more of the objects of the issue and pledge of specified securities is one of the terms of sanction of the loan.
title: Lock-in for specified securities issued to public
notes:
Lock-in for specified securities issued to public; clause (a) of regulation 16.
[QUARANTINED] hard=['bad_rule_id_format'] soft=[]

source.span_hint: Specified securities locked-in in terms of clause (b) of regulation 16

text: If the specified securities which are subject to lock-in are locked-in in terms of clause (b) of regulation 16 and the pledge of specified securities is one of the terms of sanction of the loan.
title: Lock-in for specified securities issued to public
notes:
Lock-in for specified securities issued to public; clause (b) of regulation 16.
[QUARANTINED] hard=['bad_rule_id_format'] soft=[]

source.span_hint: Specified securities68 may be pledged

text: Specified securities68[, except SR equity shares,] held by the promoters and locked-in may be pledged as a collateral security for a loan granted by a scheduled commercial bank or a public financial institution or a systemically important non-banking finance company or a housing finance company, subject to the following:
title: Pledge of locked-in specified securities
notes: Specified securities locked-in by promoters can be pledged as collateral for loans; exceptions for SR equity shares.

source.span_hint: if the specified securities are locked-in in terms of clause (a) of regulation 16

text: if the specified securities are locked-in in terms of clause (a) of regulation 16, the loan has been granted to the issuer company or its subsidiary(ies) for the purpose of financing one or more of the objects of the issue and pledge of specified securities is one of the terms of sanction of the loan;
title: Pledge conditions (a)
notes: Pledge conditions for specified securities locked-in under clause (a) of regulation 16.

source.span_hint: if the specified securities are locked-in in terms of clause (b) of regulation 16

text: if the specified securities are locked-in in terms of clause (b) of regulation 16 and the pledge of specified securities is one of the terms of sanction of the loan.
title: Pledge conditions (b)
notes: Pledge conditions for specified securities locked-in under clause (b) of regulation 16.

source.span_hint: (1) The issuer shall appoint one or more merchant bankers,

text: (1) The issuer shall appoint one or more merchant bankers, which are registered with the Board, as lead manager(s) to the issue.
title: Appointment of lead manager(s)
notes: Appointment of one or more lead managers; registered with SEBI.
